text:
I don't have verified instructions for implementing a 301 redirect from non-www to www yet. However, you can typically achieve this through your web server configuration or by using a service like Cloudflare if you're using it.

For specific instructions, please check the Setup tab on your audit page for platform-specific code, or email hello@flowblinq.ai for assistance. If you let me know your platform, I can help guide you further!
